prerequisites: A JustSift (Sift) organization account with access to your organization's people directory.
API access enabled by an organization administrator, who creates an application and generates an API token for it (request this from an admin if you are not one).
The generated API token value to supply as the connector's required `api_token` field.

authMethods.name: API token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with the JustSift API using the `api_token` secret field. JustSift expects this token in the HTTP `Authorization` header as `Authorization: Bearer {token}`. An API token is created per application after an administrator grants access. Supply the data token, which grants access to organizational people data; the data token may not be sent as a query parameter.

setupSteps.title: Obtain an API token from a JustSift administrator
setupSteps.body: API access is managed by organization administrators, who manage applications with access to their data. An admin creates an application with the required permissions, and JustSift generates a dedicated API token for that application. If you are not an administrator, request access from one. JustSift also provides demo tokens for testing against its demo directory before provisioning a real application.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token in the connector config
setupSteps.body: Enter the issued token into the required `api_token` field. The connector sends it to the JustSift API base path (https://api.justsift.com/v1) as a Bearer token in the Authorization header. No other configuration fields are required for this source.
